stages.concept:
# Unit 011: 일반동사의 과거형 (부정문, 의문문) - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **일반동사 과거형의 부정문과 의문문**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> I **didn't** eat breakfast this morning.
> 나는 오늘 아침 식사를 하지 않았다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 일반동사 과거형의 부정문은 주어에 상관없이 **did not + 동사원형**을 써요. did not은 **didn't**로 줄여 쓸 수 있어요.

> I **didn't** go to school yesterday.
> 나는 어제 학교에 가지 않았다.

> She **didn't** play soccer last weekend.
> 그녀는 지난 주말에 축구를 하지 않았다.

> They **didn't** watch the movie.
> 그들은 그 영화를 보지 않았다.

**Q. 다음 중 일반동사 과거형의 부정문으로 올바른 것을 고르세요.**
1. He didn't went to school.
2. He didn't go to school. ✅
3. He not went to school.

🧑‍🎓 학생: didn't 뒤에는 항상 동사원형이 와야 하는 거군요!

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요! 다음으로 일반동사 과거형의 **의문문**을 살펴볼게요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 일반동사 과거형의 의문문은 **Did + 주어 + 동사원형 ~?**으로 만들어요.

> **Did** you eat lunch?
> 너는 점심을 먹었니?

> **Did** she study for the test?
> 그녀는 시험 공부를 했니?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 긍정형 대답은 **Yes, 주어 + did.**로 해요.

> Did you eat lunch? — **Yes, I did.**
> 응, 나는 점심을 먹었어.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 부정형 대답은 **No, 주어 + didn't.**로 해요.

> Did she study for the test? — **No, she didn't.**
> 아니, 그녀는 시험 공부를 하지 않았어.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 과거형에서는 주어에 상관없이 did/didn't를 쓰면 되니까 현재형보다 더 간단하네요!

👩‍🏫 선생님: 정리하면 이렇게 돼요:

| | 형태 |
|------|------|
| 부정문 | 주어 + didn't + 동사원형 |
| 의문문 | Did + 주어 + 동사원형 ~? |
| 긍정 대답 | Yes, 주어 + did. |
| 부정 대답 | No, 주어 + didn't. |
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 011: 일반동사의 현재/과거 부정문 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
I (     ) like spicy food.
보기: don't / doesn't
> **정답** don't

---

**02.** 보기에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
She (     ) eat meat.
보기: don't / doesn't
> **정답** doesn't

---

**03.** 보기에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
They (     ) go to school yesterday.
보기: didn't / doesn't
> **정답** didn't

---

**04.** 보기에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
He (     ) know the answer.
보기: don't / doesn't
> **정답** doesn't

---

**05.** 보기에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
We (     ) have any homework last night.
보기: didn't / don't
> **정답** didn't

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She don't like cats.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** don't → doesn't

---

**07.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He didn't went to the park yesterday.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** went → go

---

**08.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
They doesn't play soccer after school.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** doesn't → don't

---

**09.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She didn't ate breakfast this morning.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** ate → eat

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He don't speak English well.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** don't → doesn't

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 커피를 마시지 않는다.
I coffee.
> **정답** don't drink

---

**12.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그는 수영을 잘하지 못한다.
He well.
> **정답** doesn't swim

---

**13.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
우리는 어제 영화를 보지 않았다.
We a movie yesterday.
> **정답** didn't watch

---

**14.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀는 초콜릿을 좋아하지 않는다.
She chocolate.
> **정답** doesn't like

---

**15.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그들은 지난주에 도서관에 가지 않았다.
They to the library last week.
> **정답** didn't go

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
나는 아침을 먹지 않는다.
eat breakfast don't I
> **정답** I / don't / eat / breakfast

---

**17.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그는 매일 운동하지 않는다.
doesn't exercise every day He
> **정답** He / doesn't / exercise / every / day

---

**18.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
우리는 어제 숙제를 하지 않았다.
didn't homework yesterday We do
> **정답** We / didn't / do / homework / yesterday

---

**19.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그녀는 고기를 먹지 않는다.
eat She meat doesn't
> **정답** She / doesn't / eat / meat

---

**20.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그들은 지난 여름에 여행을 가지 않았다.
didn't go last summer They on a trip
> **정답** They / didn't / go / on / a / trip / last / summer
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 011: 일반동사의 과거형 (부정문, 의문문) - 연습문제 B

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Lisa and Tom don't do their chores
together.
He doesn't go hiking last Sunday.
My cat doesn't eat vegetables.
My mother doesn't drive a small car.
> **정답** He doesn't go hiking last Sunday.

---

**02.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He didn't visit his uncle last week.
I don't play basketball yesterday.
My parents don't drink coffee.
My brother doesn't eat fish.
> **정답** I don't play basketball yesterday.

---

**03.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는
단어를 고르시오.
Melissa는 어제 학교에 가지 않았다.
Melissa
doesn't go
to school
didn't go
> **정답** doesn't go

---

**04.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는
단어를 고르시오.
Kevin은 그의 가방을 가져오지 않았다.
brought
his bag
Kevin
didn't bring
> **정답** brought

---

**05.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는
단어를 고르시오.
나는 아침을 먹지 않는다.
doesn't eat
I
breakfast
don't eat
> **정답** doesn't eat

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법에 맞지 않는 문장을 고르시오.
I don't meet Tom yesterday.
Children do not fall asleep in class.
She doesn't know the answer.
Ben didn't come to school last week.
> **정답** I don't meet Tom yesterday.

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법에 맞지 않는 문장을 고르시오.
My parents didn't know them well.
She and he don't clean their rooms on
weekends.
They weren't live in Busan.
The driver doesn't drive too fast.
> **정답** They weren't live in Busan.

---

**08.** 문장에서 틀린부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐 쓰세요.
Mike and I does not keep
our promises before.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** does → did

---

**09.** 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
___________ he get up early yesterday?
Is
Do
Does
Did
> **정답** Did

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Were your dad help me yesterday?
Did Tom finish his homework?
Does your mom walk to work every day?
Did you practice singing yesterday?
> **정답** Were your dad help me yesterday?

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Did the meeting begin at 10 every morning?
Did they eat rice for lunch?
Did he arrive on time yesterday?
Did they take a bus to school this morning?
> **정답** Did the meeting begin at 10 every morning?

---

**12.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는
단어를 고르시오.
Ken은 작년에 이곳으로 이사했니?
last year
Did Ken
Does Ken
move here
> **정답** Does Ken

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 것을 고르시오.
Does your mom cook dinner last night?
Do you see the movie last night?
Do Lisa play the piano every day?
Did your dad fix the window yesterday?
> **정답** Did your dad fix the window yesterday?

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 것을 고르시오.
Do you visit the park last Sunday?
Did you go to the dentist yesterday?
Does Anna water the flowers yesterday?
Did she and you learn swimming every
week?
> **정답** Did you go to the dentist yesterday?

---

**15.** 다음 질문에 대한 알맞은 대답을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
A: Did the man carry the boxes to your room?
B: _______________________.
Yes, he did.
No, he doesn't.
No, he didn't.
Yes, he does.
> **정답** No, he didn't., Yes, he did.

---

**16.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그 점원은 너에게 밖으로 나가는 길을 보여줬니?
Does the worker show you the exit?
Do the worker showed you the exit?
Did the worker show you the exit?
Do the worker show you the exit?
> **정답** Did the worker show you the exit?

---

**17.** 밑줄 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Do children study hard?
Does the baby have small hands?
Did his dream come true?
Did you went to the park last Sunday?
> **정답** Did you went to the park last Sunday?

---

**18.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Did Tom and Jake made a plan for the trip?
Do they study together?
She didn't washed the cups.
Does she bake bread every Monday?
> **정답** She didn't washed the cups., Did Tom and Jake
made a plan for the trip?

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I didn 't listened to the
radio today.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** listened → listen

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Did children on the bus talked
loudly?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** talked → talk
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 011 일반동사의 과거형 (부정문, 의문문)중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 문장을 의문문으로 바꾸시오.
Tom went swimming last week.
  (     )   (     )  swimming last week?
정답 Did, Tom, go

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 의문문으로 바꾸시오.
They brushed their teeth.
  (     )   (     )  their teeth?
정답 Did, they, brush

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 부정문으로 쓰시오. (과제시제, 줄임말 사용)
Jake wrote this letter.
→  (     )   (     )   (     )  this letter.
정답 Jake, didn't, write

---

**04.** 질문에 대답하는 문장을 완성하시오. (줄임말 사용)
A: Did you buy a new hat yesterday?
B: No, I  (     )   (     )  any.
정답 didn't, buy

---

**05.** 주어진 대답에 맞게 질문하는 문장을 완성하시오.
A:  (     )  you  (     )  the wall?
B: Yes, I did. I painted the wall yesterday.
정답 Did, paint

---

**06.** 문장에서 틀린부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐 쓰세요.
I  [did]  [not]  [slept]  [well]  [last]
[night.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 slept → sleep

---

**07.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[Did]  [you]  [found]  [the]  [key?]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 found → find

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
너는 그 문제의 답을 찾았니?
힌트 (     ) you, did, an answer, find
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  to the
problem?
정답 Did, you, find, an, answer

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
Amy는 마을까지 운전하지 않았다.
힌트 (     ) didn't, the, town, drive, to
Amy  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 didn't, drive, to, the, town

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
너는 어제 어머니를 도와드렸니? [help, your mom]
 you  (     )   (     )   (     )  yesterday?
정답 Did, help, your, mom

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 011: 일반동사의 과거형 (부정문, 의문문) - 변형문제

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Amy and Tom don't do their project together.
He doesn't go swimming last Saturday.
My cat doesn't eat vegetables.
My mother doesn't drive a small car.
> 정답: He doesn't go swimming last Saturday.

---

**02.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He didn't visit his uncle last month.
I don't play tennis yesterday.
My grandparents don't wear hats.
My brother doesn't eat pizza.
> 정답: I don't play tennis yesterday.

---

**03.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는 단어를 고르시오.
Kate는 어제 도서관에 가지 않았다.
Kate doesn't go to the library didn't go
> 정답: doesn't go

---

**04.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는 단어를 고르시오.
Jake는 그의 가방을 가져오지 않았다. brought his bag Jake didn't bring
> 정답: brought

---

**05.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는 단어를 고르시오.
나는 저녁을 먹지 않는다. doesn't eat I dinner don't eat
> 정답: doesn't eat

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법에 맞지 않는 문장을 고르시오.
I don't meet Tom yesterday.
Students do not sleep in class.
She doesn't know the answer.
Amy didn't come to school last Friday.
> 정답: I don't meet Tom yesterday.

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법에 맞지 않는 문장을 고르시오.
My parents didn't know her well.
She and he don't clean their desks on Mondays.
They weren't live in Seoul.
The bus doesn't go too fast.
> 정답: They weren't live in Seoul.

---

**08.** 문장에서 틀린부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐 쓰세요.
Tom and I does not keep our promises before. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> 정답: does → did

---

**09.** 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
___________ she wake up early yesterday?
Is Do Does Did
> 정답: Did

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Were your dad help me yesterday?
Did Lisa finish her homework?
Does your dad drive to work every day?
Did you practice piano yesterday?
> 정답: Were your dad help me yesterday?

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Did the movie begin at 9 every evening?
Did they eat bread for breakfast?
Did he come on time yesterday?
Did they take a taxi to school this morning?
> 정답: Did the movie begin at 9 every evening?

---

**12.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는 단어를 고르시오.
Amy는 작년에 이곳으로 이사했니? last year Did Amy Does Amy move here
> 정답: Does Amy

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 것을 고르시오.
Does your mom bake cookies last night?
Do you watch the show last night?
Do Kate play the violin every day?
Did your dad wash the car yesterday?
> 정답: Did your dad wash the car yesterday?

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 것을 고르시오.
Do you visit the park last Sunday?
Did you go to the hospital yesterday?
Does Tom water the flowers yesterday?
